---
package: "openpipeline"
version: "v4.2.0"
title: "from_h5mu_to_seurat"
namespace: "Convert"
description: "Converts an h5mu file into a Seurat file."
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline v4.2.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `from_h5mu_to_seurat`  
Namespace: `convert`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline/tree/v4.2.0/src/convert/from_h5mu_to_seurat)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/convert/from_h5mu_to_seurat)

:::

Restrictions:
  - Only the intersection of cells is currently loaded into the Seurat object due to the object structure limitation.
  - Multimodal embeddings (global .obsm slot) are loaded with the assay.used field set to the default assay.
  - Embeddings names are changed in order to comply with R & Seurat requirements and conventions.
  - Feature names with underscores ('_') are automatically replaced with dashes ('-')
  - Seurat does not support global variables metadata /var.



## Argument group

### Arguments

|Name       |Description        |Attributes                                |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input`  |Input h5mu file    |`file`, required, example: `"input.h5mu"` |
|`--output` |Output Seurat file |`file`, required, example: `"output.rds"` |

## Authors


  * Robrecht Cannoodt [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/rcannood) [{{< fa brands orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3641-729X) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/robrechtcannoodt) (author, maintainer)

## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_h5mu_to_seurat/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/convert/from_h5mu_to_seurat).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_h5mu_to_seurat/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).
